Class ApplicationConfig

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.ApplicationConfig
@Configuration public class ApplicationConfig extends Object
Application security configuration class.

This class defines Spring beans related to authentication, including the UserDetailsService, AuthenticationProvider, AuthenticationManager, and PasswordEncoder.

It uses the UserRepository to load users by e-mail address during authentication.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ApplicationConfig(UserRepository userRepository)
    Creates a new application configuration instance.

    Method
    Description

    Creates the AuthenticationManager bean used by Spring Security.
    org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationProvider
    authenticationProvider()
    Creates an AuthenticationProvider bean based on DAO authentication.
    org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder
    passwordEncoder()
    Creates the password encoder bean used to hash and verify passwords.
    org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetailsService
    userDetailsService()
    Creates a UserDetailsService bean that loads a user by e-mail.

  • Constructor Details

    • ApplicationConfig

      public ApplicationConfig(UserRepository userRepository)
      Creates a new application configuration instance.
      Parameters:
      userRepository - the repository used to retrieve users from the database

  • Method Details

    • userDetailsService

      @Bean public org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetailsService userDetailsService()
      Creates a UserDetailsService bean that loads a user by e-mail.
      Returns:
      a user details service implementation
      Throws:
      org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UsernameNotFoundException - if no user exists with the given e-mail

    • authenticationProvider

      @Bean public org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationProvider authenticationProvider()
      Creates an AuthenticationProvider bean based on DAO authentication.

      The provider uses the configured UserDetailsService and PasswordEncoder to authenticate users.

      Returns:
      the authentication provider

    • authenticationManager

      @Bean public org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(org.springframework.security.config.annotation.authentication.configuration.AuthenticationConfiguration config) throws Exception
      Creates the AuthenticationManager bean used by Spring Security.
      Parameters:
      config - the authentication configuration provided by Spring
      Returns:
      the authentication manager
      Throws:
      Exception - if the authentication manager cannot be created

    • passwordEncoder

      @Bean public org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder()
      Creates the password encoder bean used to hash and verify passwords.
      Returns:
      a BCrypt password encoder
